message: docs: revise walking skeleton scope for project bootstrap

files.patch:
@@ -3,8 +3,15 @@
 ## Walking skeleton (ITER-0000)
 
 **Intent:** Prove Ghost Pepper exists as a menu bar dictation app that can hotkey-record, transcribe speech with one local speech-model path, and deliver the result through clipboard fallback with visible feedback.
-**Design rationale:** This is the thinnest end-to-end slice that demonstrates the product loop without onboarding, real paste targeting, cleanup, OCR, settings, or history. It proves shell, hotkey, audio capture, model bootstrap, transcription, clipboard delivery, and user feedback together.
+**Design rationale:** This is the thinnest end-to-end slice that demonstrates the product loop without onboarding, real paste targeting, cleanup, OCR, settings, or history. Because the repository starts empty, it also includes the minimum XcodeGen and hosted-test scaffold needed to implement the slice without boxing in the later app structure.
